title: pi-diff Configuration
description: Configuration schema for pi-diff — a Shiki-powered terminal diff renderer for pi.

disabledTools.description: pi-diff tools to omit. Disabling write or edit restores Pi's built-in tool.

sepStyle.description: How collapsed context between hunks is rendered. Auto shows function context + gap when both available.

lineNumbers.description: Show line numbers in the gutter column.

indicatorStyle.description: Left-edge visual indicator for changed lines.

longLines.description: How to handle content wider than the terminal.

fileHeader.description: Show a header line with filename and +/- change statistics.

theme.description: Named color preset for diff backgrounds. Any string is accepted as a preset name; built-in presets are: default, midnight, subtle, neon. When the preset is unknown, colors are auto-derived from the active Pi theme.

shikiTheme.description: Shiki syntax highlighting theme name. See https://shiki.style/themes for available themes.

colors.description: Per-color hex overrides (#RRGGBB). Each color can be individually overridden. These take priority over the named theme.

bgAddHighlight.description: Word-level highlight background for added characters.

bgDelHighlight.description: Word-level highlight background for deleted characters.

bgEmpty.description: Filler background for empty space in split view (shorter side).

fgAdd.description: Foreground for added lines (overrides syntax highlighting). Usually left null.

fgDel.description: Foreground for deleted lines (overrides syntax highlighting). Usually left null.

fgStripe.description: Foreground for diagonal stripe fill (split view empty space).

fgSafeMuted.description: Safe fallback foreground for low-contrast syntax tokens.

splitMinWidth.description: Minimum terminal width (in columns) to prefer split view over unified.

splitMinCodeWidth.description: Minimum code-column width per side in split view before falling back to unified.

maxPreviewLines.description: Maximum diff lines shown in edit-tool preview.

maxRenderLines.description: Maximum diff lines shown in write-tool output.

wordDiffMinSimilarity.description: Minimum similarity ratio (0.0–1.0) for word-diff emphasis to activate. Higher values restrict word-diff to more similar lines.
